resume.professional_summary: AI engineer with experience building retrieval, automation, and analytics workflows across Azure, Python, and full-stack web systems. Delivered production copilots, document processing pipelines, and experiment-driven product features with measurable efficiency gains. Strengths include prompt design, model evaluation, backend integration, and translating job-specific requirements into concise, impact-oriented resume content for target roles quickly.
technical_skills: AI/ML: Prompt Engineering, RAG, LLM Evaluation, Vector Search
Cloud: Azure OpenAI, Azure Functions, Azure Storage, Key Vault
Data: Pandas, NumPy, PySpark, ETL Pipelines
Backend: FastAPI, Flask, REST APIs, Authentication
DevOps: GitHub Actions, Docker, CI/CD, Monitoring
Tools: Git, Postman, Jira, VS Code

thorogood_bullets: Built AI-assisted workflow reducing document triage time by 38% across daily operations.
Implemented retrieval pipeline with chunking and metadata filters to improve answer precision.
Designed prompt templates that increased structured output consistency for recruiter-facing summaries.
Integrated secure REST endpoints for resume analysis and downstream reporting automation.
Created evaluation rubric and test set to track hallucination rate reductions weekly.
Collaborated with product and hiring teams to align resume signals with JD priorities.
Automated validation checks for bullet length, section counts, and schema compliance.
gwu_gta_bullets: Guided students on applied machine learning projects using reproducible Python experimentation workflows.
Developed grading scripts that cut rubric processing time while improving feedback consistency.
Supported lab sessions on data cleaning, feature engineering, and model performance interpretation.
Mentored teams on presentation structure and concise technical storytelling for final demos.

wtchtwr_bullets: Built full-stack platform for watchlist tracking with personalized alerts and trend dashboards.
Implemented role-based authentication and secure API routes for user-specific portfolio data.
Added data ingestion jobs that normalized records from multiple sources every hour.
Created KPI visualizations to summarize engagement, retention, and conversion funnel performance.
Optimized query patterns, reducing dashboard load times during high traffic periods.
Instrumented logging and alerting to detect ingestion failures and retry automatically.

project2.name: Project2 Name
bullets: Built resume keyword alignment checker that maps JD terms to candidate evidence sections.
Added rule-based scoring to prioritize missing competencies and recommend concise rewrites.
Exported results to JSON for downstream template rendering and audit traceability.

project3.name: Project3 Name
bullets: Developed interview prep assistant generating targeted question sets from job requirements.
Implemented feedback loops to refine prompt quality and reduce repetitive outputs.
Deployed local-first interface supporting manual JSON import without external API dependencies.
